task_yaml.task:
I am quickly evaluating a RAG evaluation benchmark paper and want a complete
desktop GUI evidence chain: PDF reader, Zotero, Obsidian, Calc, and Writer.

Use the real desktop applications installed by the service: a PDF reader,
Zotero, Obsidian, LibreOffice Calc, and LibreOffice Writer. Do not use a local
GUI mock, and do not only use scripts to write the final files directly. The
installation verification record is saved at
`/tmp_workspace/clawbench/service_state/real_rag_gui_apps_task_105_07.json`.

1. Open and read `/tmp_workspace/clawbench/sources/papers/ragas_evaluation.pdf`
   in a PDF Reader GUI. Confirm the paper title, authors, year, main task, main
   metric or metric suite, one limitation, and whether it is worth reading
   further. Save a PDF reader screenshot to
   `/tmp_workspace/results/pdf_reader_screenshot.png`.
2. In real Zotero, create one literature record. Fill in at least title,
   authors, year, and publication, and attach this PDF path. Export a standard
   Zotero record to `/tmp_workspace/results/zotero_record_export.bib`, `.ris`,
   or `.rdf`, and save a Zotero window screenshot to
   `/tmp_workspace/results/zotero_record_screenshot.png`. The screenshot should
   show the PDF attachment or nonzero attachment evidence for the same paper
   item.
3. In real Obsidian, create or open a vault, create a note in it, and save/copy
   it to `/tmp_workspace/results/obsidian/RAG Evaluation Note.md`. Also export
   or copy it to `/tmp_workspace/results/rag_evaluation_note_export.md`. The
   note must contain these three sections:
   - Main Task
   - Main Metric
   - One Limitation
   Save an Obsidian window screenshot to
   `/tmp_workspace/results/obsidian_note_screenshot.png`. The screenshot should
   show the opened note title and required section content. Do not show only
   the Obsidian startup page or vault picker.
4. In real LibreOffice Calc, create and save
   `/tmp_workspace/results/rag_reading_tracker.ods`. Do not only use headless
   conversion, a hand-built zip, or a script to write the final ODS. Use these
   columns:
   Title | Year | Main Task | Main Metric or Metric Suite | Worth reading further (yes/no)
   Save a Calc window screenshot to
   `/tmp_workspace/results/calc_tracker_screenshot.png`; the screenshot should
   show the opened tracker spreadsheet.
5. In real LibreOffice Writer, create and save
   `/tmp_workspace/results/rag_quick_judgment.odt`. Do not only use headless
   conversion, a hand-built zip, or a script to write the final ODT. Also save
   or export a plain-text audit copy from the Writer content:
   `/tmp_workspace/results/rag_quick_judgment.txt`. The judgment must be at
   most 80 Chinese characters or 80 English words, and it must state whether
   the paper is worth reading further and why. Save a Writer window screenshot
   to `/tmp_workspace/results/writer_judgment_screenshot.png`; the screenshot
   should show the judgment text. ODS/ODT should be openable OpenDocument files
   and cannot be replaced by CSV/TXT.
6. Save `/tmp_workspace/results/real_gui_evidence.md`, listing the real
   applications you actually launched, screenshot paths, export file paths, and
   any installation or login issues encountered.

Do not only copy the abstract; the note, table, and Writer judgment should all
reflect your judgment from reading the PDF.

prompt:
